text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The day has finally arrived, my dear Doto! Come,
we must make haste for the Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh, it's here already?! I haven't even debuted yet...
choice_data_list:
But we're going to watch the previous
generation.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh my goooosh, I was so nervous!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She made the mistake of thinking she was an
entrant. With things set straight, the three of us
go to the race as spectators.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Um, I have something to ask you two...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I heard this year's Derby is full of human-eating
monsters.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha! I can't vouch for the human-eating part, but they are known as the "Ultimate Generation."

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Have a look for yourself. There goes Seiun Sky,
floating listless and untethered as a cloud. And
here you'll see King Halo, who touts herself as
first-rate wherever and whenever she pleases.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Over there is Special Week, the pride of
Hokkaido with the airs of a ruler! Grass Wonder
and El Condor Pasa also belong to this
generation, but they are not with us today.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A true golden act their generation is! Those
spangles finely set the stage for my arrival come
next year!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, oh, ohhh, wow... All five of them sound so
strong!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the ceremonial proceedings finish at the
paddock, the race begins. And then...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: T-T-Trainer... I just saw something... amazing...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: This is the Derby... and that.. was Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week emerges the winner, finishing with
an impressive lead of five lengths.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The hair-raising competition between the Golden
Generation has shaken Fuchu, and no less has it
shaken Meisho Doto.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh nonono! Wh-what if I was t-t-to run in a race
like this?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: They would run laps over me! I have to do something—I need to do something.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Where should I start?! What about my dash? I
could try swimming, or weightlifting? Wait, what
about my dash?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Aaahh, I've said dash twice now. Hwaah, is this
part of an elaborate prank on me?! Ohhh...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: COMPOSE YOURSELF!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O's dramatic voice echoes throughout
the arena.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Is this all it takes to frighten you? Who are you?
Do I have to remind you?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You are Meisho Doto, the one who has chosen to
proceed forth alongside me, T.M. Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The thousand-stair climb begins with one step. If
misplaced, the future is no more. Am I
misguided?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Gasp?! You're r-right! Oh, Trainer...
choice_data_list: First thing is to focus on your debut.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You're... right... It isn't like I'm suddenly running in
the Derby tomorrow...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'll start small and work my way up. If you and
Opera O are willing to support me...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I'll do my best! I'll work really, really hard for my debut!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto comes back to her senses, gripping
her fists tightly with vigor. The Derby has had
quite the positive effect on her.
